# Prestige Build Co.

> Arizona's premier luxury residential contractor building bespoke custom homes across the greater Phoenix metropolitan area. Founded and led by Matthew Juris. Licensed, bonded, and insured. Arizona ROC #360344.

## Business Overview

Prestige Build Co. is a luxury custom home builder based in Arizona. The company intentionally limits the number of projects it takes on each year so that Matthew Juris can provide direct, hands-on involvement from groundbreaking to delivery on every build. This is not a production builder — every home is a bespoke project.

## Key Facts

- **Business Name:** Prestige Build Co. (also: Prestige Build Co. Construction)
- **Type:** General Residential Contractor
- **License:** Arizona ROC #360344, General Residential B
- **Qualifying Party:** Matthew Juris
- **Phone:** 602-573-7414
- **Email (General):** Matt@PrestigeBuildCo.com
- **Email (Design):** Emily@PrestigeBuildCo.com
- **Instagram:** @prestigebuildcoaz
- **Website:** https://prestigebuildco.com

## Team

**Matthew Juris** — Founder, Builder & Principal
Licensed General Contractor (ROC #360344) and licensed REALTOR® at Realty ONE Group (License #SA634367000). Matthew spent 17+ years in Arizona luxury real estate, closing 120+ transactions and $70M+ in sales volume before founding Prestige Build Co. He builds what he knows discerning buyers actually value.

**Emily Juris** — Director of Interior Design
Responsible for the interior character, material selections, and luxury feel of every Prestige Build Co. home. Emily turns a well-constructed house into a home that commands attention.

## Services

- Custom Home New Construction
- Design-Build (architecture + construction under one contract)
- Home Additions
- Luxury Renovations
- Pre-Construction Consulting

## Service Area

Greater Phoenix Metropolitan Area, Arizona:
Gilbert · Queen Creek · Chandler · Scottsdale · Cave Creek · and surrounding communities

## Current & Completed Projects

**Key Biscayne Residence — Gilbert, AZ**
8,121 sq ft under roof. 4,360 sq ft main house, 964 sq ft guest casita with full kitchen, 5-car garage, 1,136 sq ft covered rear patio. Dual 72" linear masonry gas fireplaces (interior and exterior), Sub-Zero and Wolf appliances, R38 spray foam insulation, 2×6 exterior framing.

**Pegasus Pkwy Residence — Pegasus Airpark, Queen Creek, AZ**
4,115 sq ft, 4 bed / 4.5 bath, 4-car garage with hangar integration, gas fireplace, Sub-Zero, Wolf & Cove appliances, 2×6 framing, Tyvek weather barrier, spray foam insulation. Located within Arizona's exclusive Pegasus Airpark fly-in community.

## Credentials & Licensing

- Arizona ROC #360344 — General Residential B
- Fully licensed, bonded, and insured
- REALTOR® License: SA634367000 (Realty ONE Group)

## Build Process Summary

1. Pre-Construction Consulting — lot evaluation, design review, budget analysis
2. Design & Planning — architectural review, material selections, permit preparation
3. Permitting — full permit management by the licensed GC of record
4. Construction — Matthew Juris directly oversees every phase
5. Systems & Finishes — mechanical, electrical, plumbing, luxury finish installation
6. Final Delivery — punch list, walkthrough, and handoff

## Frequently Asked Questions

**Q: Is Prestige Build Co. licensed in Arizona?**
A: Yes. Prestige Build Co. holds Arizona ROC #360344, General Residential B. Fully licensed, bonded, and insured. Matthew Juris is the qualifying party.

**Q: What areas does Prestige Build Co. serve?**
A: Gilbert, Queen Creek, Chandler, Scottsdale, Cave Creek, and the greater Phoenix metropolitan area.

**Q: Does Prestige Build Co. do design-build projects?**
A: Yes. Full design-build services are available — architecture and construction under a single contract.

**Q: How long does a custom home take to build?**
A: Most luxury custom homes take 12–18 months from permit approval to final delivery, depending on size and complexity.

**Q: What is the typical budget for a Prestige Build Co. custom home?**
A: Prestige Build Co. specializes in luxury custom homes. Projects typically begin at $500,000 and scale upward based on scope and finishes.
